name: meeting2prompt
description: Capture local demo-review evidence so the user's active Codex model can produce focused code-change tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Turn demo feedback into focused Codex tasks.
interface.longDescription: Record a local demo review, capture transcript and page-focus evidence, and hand the raw evidence to the user's active Codex model with narrow scope constraints. Meeting2Prompt does not call a model API or generate requirements on its own.
defaultPrompt: Start a demo review for this repository.
Finish the review and turn only the discussed changes into tasks.
